name: Rigatoni Alla Fontina
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Cook the rigatoni in 5 to 6 quarts salted boiling water until al dante (they will finish cooking in the oven).
3. Drain well and place in a large bowl.
4. Add 2/3 of the butter, 1/2 of the Parmigiano cheese, and nutmeg and mix well until all the pasta is coated.
5. In a buttered baking dish, make a layer of the pasta, a layer of the fontina cheese, sprinkle with the Parmigiano cheese, and repeat the process until the pasta is used up, ending with a layer of the fontina on top.
6. Sprinkle with Parmigiano cheese and black pepper.
7. Dot with the remaining butter.
8. Bake for 15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted. May be served on flat plates.
